name: Apache HTTP Server 中间件基线 (CIS Benchmark + 等保 2.0)
description: Apache 2.4+ 安全配置基线. 参考 CIS Apache HTTP Server 2.4 Benchmark. check/fix 自动适配 RHEL(httpd /etc/httpd) 与 Debian(apache2 /etc/apache2) 双路径.

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; if grep -rhEq '^[[:space:]]*User[[:space:]]+(apache|www-data|nobody|daemon|\$\{APACHE_RUN_USER\})' $L 2>/dev/null; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi
^OK$

fix.suggestion: httpd.conf 设置: User apache; Group apache (Debian 用 ${APACHE_RUN_USER})
fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; if [ "$SVC" = httpd ]; then VAL=apache; else VAL='${APACHE_RUN_USER}'; fi; [ -f "$CONF.mxbak" ] || cp "$CONF" "$CONF.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*User[[:space:]]+' "$CONF"; then sed -i -E "s|^([[:space:]]*)User[[:space:]]+.*|\1User $VAL|" "$CONF"; else printf 'User %s\n' "$VAL" >> "$CONF"; fi; if [ "$SVC" = httpd ]; then if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*Group[[:space:]]+' "$CONF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)Group[[:space:]]+.*|\1Group apache|' "$CONF"; else printf 'Group apache\n' >> "$CONF"; fi; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$CONF.mxbak" "$CONF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

rules.title: ServerTokens Prod
rules.description: 默认 Full 暴露版本+模块, 必须设 Prod.

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; if grep -rhEq '^[[:space:]]*ServerTokens[[:space:]]+Prod' $L 2>/dev/null; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi
^OK$

fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; [ -f "$CONF.mxbak" ] || cp "$CONF" "$CONF.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*ServerTokens[[:space:]]+' "$CONF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)ServerTokens[[:space:]]+.*|\1ServerTokens Prod|' "$CONF"; else printf 'ServerTokens Prod\n' >> "$CONF"; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$CONF.mxbak" "$CONF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

rules.title: ServerSignature Off
rules.description: 错误页面不应附加 server 信息.

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; if grep -rhEq '^[[:space:]]*ServerSignature[[:space:]]+Off' $L 2>/dev/null; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi
^OK$

fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; [ -f "$CONF.mxbak" ] || cp "$CONF" "$CONF.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*ServerSignature[[:space:]]+' "$CONF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)ServerSignature[[:space:]]+.*|\1ServerSignature Off|' "$CONF"; else printf 'ServerSignature Off\n' >> "$CONF"; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$CONF.mxbak" "$CONF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

param: SSLF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf || echo /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/ssl.conf ); [ -f "$SSLF" ] || { echo NOSSL; exit 0; }; P=$(grep -hiE '^[[:space:]]*SSLProtocol[[:space:]]+' "$SSLF" | tail -1); [ -z "$P" ] && { echo FAIL; exit 0; }; if echo "$P" | grep -Eiq '(^|[[:space:]])(SSLv2|SSLv3)([[:space:]]|$)' || echo "$P" | grep -Eiq '(^|[[:space:]])[+]?TLSv1(\.[01])?([[:space:]]|$)'; then echo FAIL; else echo OK; fi
^(OK|NOSSL)$

fix.command: set -e; SSLF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf || echo /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/ssl.conf ); [ -f "$SSLF" ] || exit 0; if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; [ -f "$SSLF.mxbak" ] || cp "$SSLF" "$SSLF.mxbak"; if grep -Eiq '^[[:space:]]*SSLProtocol[[:space:]]+' "$SSLF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)SSLProtocol[[:space:]]+.*|\1SSLProtocol all -SSLv2 -SSLv3 -TLSv1 -TLSv1.1|I' "$SSLF"; else printf 'SSLProtocol all -SSLv2 -SSLv3 -TLSv1 -TLSv1.1\n' >> "$SSLF"; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$SSLF.mxbak" "$SSLF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

rules.title: SSLHonorCipherOrder On
rules.description: 强制服务端密码套件优先级.

param: SSLF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf || echo /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/ssl.conf ); [ -f "$SSLF" ] || { echo NOSSL; exit 0; }; if grep -Eiq '^[[:space:]]*SSLHonorCipherOrder[[:space:]]+On' "$SSLF"; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi
^(OK|NOSSL)$

fix.command: set -e; SSLF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf.d/ssl.conf || echo /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/ssl.conf ); [ -f "$SSLF" ] || exit 0; if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; [ -f "$SSLF.mxbak" ] || cp "$SSLF" "$SSLF.mxbak"; if grep -Eiq '^[[:space:]]*SSLHonorCipherOrder[[:space:]]+' "$SSLF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)SSLHonorCipherOrder[[:space:]]+.*|\1SSLHonorCipherOrder On|I' "$SSLF"; else printf 'SSLHonorCipherOrder On\n' >> "$SSLF"; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$SSLF.mxbak" "$SSLF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; if grep -rhEq '^[[:space:]]*Header[[:space:]].*Strict-Transport-Security' $L 2>/dev/null; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi
^OK$

fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; if [ "$SVC" = apache2 ]; then a2enmod headers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if [ -f "$BASE/conf.d/security.conf" ]; then TGT="$BASE/conf.d/security.conf"; elif [ -f "$BASE/conf-available/security.conf" ]; then TGT="$BASE/conf-available/security.conf"; else TGT="$CONF"; fi; [ -f "$TGT.mxbak" ] || cp "$TGT" "$TGT.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*Header[[:space:]].*Strict-Transport-Security' "$TGT"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)Header[[:space:]].*Strict-Transport-Security.*|\1Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"|' "$TGT"; else printf 'Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"\n' >> "$TGT"; fi; if [ "$SVC" = apache2 ] && [ -f "$BASE/conf-available/security.conf" ]; then a2enconf security >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$TGT.mxbak" "$TGT"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

rules.title: 禁用 Indexes
rules.description: Options 不应含 Indexes (目录列表).

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; grep -rhE '^[[:space:]]*Options[[:space:]]' $L 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '(^|[[:space:]])[+]?Indexes([[:space:]]|$)'

fix.suggestion: 需人工处理: 逐个 Directory/vhost 段评估后去掉目录列表, 改为 Options -Indexes (注意区分 AllowOverride 中的 Indexes, 勿误改). 不可全局自动替换, 否则可能破坏依赖目录列表的业务路径或导致 httpd -t 失败.

rules.title: 配置文件权限 ≤ 640
rules.description: httpd.conf/apache2.conf 权限不应世界可读.

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); P=$(stat -c %a "$CONF" 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$P" ] && { echo NOFILE; exit 0; }; [ "$P" -le 640 ] && echo OK || echo "$P"
^(OK|NOFILE)$

fix.suggestion: chmod 640 配置文件 && chown root:apache (Debian root:www-data)
fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); [ -f "$CONF" ] || exit 0; chmod 640 "$CONF"; if getent group apache >/dev/null 2>&1; then chown root:apache "$CONF"; elif getent group www-data >/dev/null 2>&1; then chown root:www-data "$CONF"; fi

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; if grep -rhEq '^[[:space:]]*TraceEnable[[:space:]]+Off' $L 2>/dev/null; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi
^OK$

fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; [ -f "$CONF.mxbak" ] || cp "$CONF" "$CONF.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*TraceEnable[[:space:]]+' "$CONF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)TraceEnable[[:space:]]+.*|\1TraceEnable Off|' "$CONF"; else printf 'TraceEnable Off\n' >> "$CONF"; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$CONF.mxbak" "$CONF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; V=$(grep -rhE '^[[:space:]]*Timeout[[:space:]]+[0-9]+' $L 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); [ -z "$V" ] && { echo MISSING; exit 0; }; [ "$V" -le 60 ] && echo OK || echo "$V"
^OK$

fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; [ -f "$CONF.mxbak" ] || cp "$CONF" "$CONF.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*Timeout[[:space:]]+' "$CONF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)Timeout[[:space:]]+.*|\1Timeout 60|' "$CONF"; else printf 'Timeout 60\n' >> "$CONF"; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$CONF.mxbak" "$CONF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; V=$(grep -rhE '^[[:space:]]*KeepAliveTimeout[[:space:]]+[0-9]+' $L 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); [ -z "$V" ] && { echo MISSING; exit 0; }; [ "$V" -le 15 ] && echo OK || echo "$V"
^OK$

fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; [ -f "$CONF.mxbak" ] || cp "$CONF" "$CONF.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*KeepAliveTimeout[[:space:]]+' "$CONF"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)KeepAliveTimeout[[:space:]]+.*|\1KeepAliveTimeout 15|' "$CONF"; else printf 'KeepAliveTimeout 15\n' >> "$CONF"; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$CONF.mxbak" "$CONF"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"

rules.title: X-Content-Type-Options nosniff
rules.description: 防 MIME 嗅探. 需 mod_headers.

param: CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); L="$CONF"; for d in "$BASE/conf.d" "$BASE/conf-available" "$BASE/conf-enabled" "$BASE/mods-enabled"; do [ -d "$d" ] && L="$L $d"; done; if grep -rhEq '^[[:space:]]*Header[[:space:]].*X-Content-Type-Options[[:space:]].*nosniff' $L 2>/dev/null; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi
^OK$

fix.command: set -e; CONF=$( [ -f /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf ] && echo /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf || echo /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ); BASE=$(dirname "$(dirname "$CONF")"); if [ -d /etc/httpd ]; then SVC=httpd; CHK="httpd -t"; else SVC=apache2; CHK="apachectl -t"; fi; if [ "$SVC" = apache2 ]; then a2enmod headers >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if [ -f "$BASE/conf.d/security.conf" ]; then TGT="$BASE/conf.d/security.conf"; elif [ -f "$BASE/conf-available/security.conf" ]; then TGT="$BASE/conf-available/security.conf"; else TGT="$CONF"; fi; [ -f "$TGT.mxbak" ] || cp "$TGT" "$TGT.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*Header[[:space:]].*X-Content-Type-Options' "$TGT"; then sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)Header[[:space:]].*X-Content-Type-Options.*|\1Header always set X-Content-Type-Options nosniff|' "$TGT"; else printf 'Header always set X-Content-Type-Options nosniff\n' >> "$TGT"; fi; if [ "$SVC" = apache2 ] && [ -f "$BASE/conf-available/security.conf" ]; then a2enconf security >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! eval "$CHK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$TGT.mxbak" "$TGT"; exit 1; fi; systemctl reload "$SVC" 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart "$SVC"
